accommodation_units.name: Burlahan Hotel Standart Room
accommodation_units.description:
Standard Room – Burlahan Otel

The Standard Room at Burlahan Otel offers a comfortable and authentic stay in the heart of Urla, combining traditional Aegean charm with modern comfort. Designed with natural materials and warm tones, the room provides a peaceful atmosphere for guests looking to relax and enjoy the unique character of the region.

Each room is thoughtfully equipped to ensure a pleasant and convenient stay, whether you are visiting for a short getaway or a longer holiday.

Room Features

Comfortable double bed or twin bed option

Private bathroom with shower

Air conditioning

Free Wi-Fi

Flat-screen TV

Fresh towels and toiletries

Wardrobe and storage space

Room Highlights

Cozy boutique hotel atmosphere

Calm and relaxing environment

Ideal for couples or solo travelers

The Standard Room is perfect for guests who want a simple, stylish, and comfortable place to unwind while exploring Urla and its beautiful surroundings.

As a Duotone Pro Center instructor, I commit to:

  • Safety First: Prioritize student and equipment safety at all times

  • Environmental Responsibility: Respect and protect our natural environment

submission_data.strongest_asset:
My strongest assets as an instructor are my ability to use different teaching methods depending on the student, as every student has a unique learning style. 
As I continue teaching over time, this ability keeps developing further. 
I maintain good relationships with my students by being friendly when appropriate and respectful at all times. 
Additionally, by learning from more experienced instructors, I can continue to improve myself in these areas.
submission_data.previous_centers: I worked at UKC for two seasons
submission_data.professional_standards:
I expect a kite center to operate with the highest standards of safety, professionalism, and consistency. 
This includes experienced instructors, well-maintained equipment, clear teaching methods, and a strong focus on student progression. 
Respect for riders, teamwork among staff, and a positive learning environment are also essential professional standards for kite center

submission_data.why_dpc_urla:
I want to work at Duotone Pro Center Urla powered by UKC because it represents high standards, professionalism, and quality teaching, not just giving lessons.

I am looking for an environment where safety, structure, and student experience are a priority. This is exactly what I see in a Duotone Pro Center and in the way UKC operates.

Working with professional equipment and within a well-organized and positive team is very important to me. It allows instructors to teach better and students to feel safe and confident.

I also want to be part of a center where I can improve my coaching skills, learn from a demanding professional environment, and grow as an instructor, while contributing positively to the quality and image of the school.
submission_data.expected_hours: 4 hours a day but If there are days when more needs to be done, I will do more … we can adapt it as you wish
submission_data.strongest_asset:
I consider my self as a responsible person and I enjoy human contact. Even though this will be my first experience as a coach,  I know that I communicate clearly, I m patient , friendly and positive person . 
I also speak several languages, which is a strong asset when working with international students.
submission_data.previous_centers: It’s going to be my first experience 😊
submission_data.professional_standards: I expect high safety standards, clear teaching methods, professional equipment, and a well organized structure. For me professional standards is a school where instructors are responsible, students feel safe and supported, and the learning experience is consistent and professional.

service_packages.name: 6Hours- Starter Package
service_packages.description:
Perfect introduction to kitesurfing for beginners with no previous experience.

What you will learn:
Safety theory and wind window basics
Equipment setup and kite control
Kite flying
Body dragging in the water
Self-rescue techniques
Water-Start Basics with board
Goal of the course:
At the end of the 6-hour starter pack you will be able to confidently control the kite in the water and understand the fundamentals of kitesurfing.

Ideal for:
People who want to try the sport before committing to a full course.

service_packages.name: 8h – Rider Pack
service_packages.description:
The perfect course for students who want to start riding the board as soon as possible.

What you will learn
Everything in the Starter Pack plus:

Advanced body dragging

Board introduction and water starts

First board rides

Riding short distances downwind

Board recovery techniques

Goal of the course
By the end of this course most students will complete their first rides on the board and begin controlling direction.

Ideal for
Beginners who want a real riding experience during their first course.

service_packages.name: 6Hours-Group Starter Pack
service_packages.description:
Shared Kite Experience

The 6-hour Group Starter Pack is the perfect introduction to kitesurfing for complete beginners who want to experience the sport in a fun and social environment.

Group lessons take place in small groups where two students share one kite, allowing everyone to observe, learn, and practice step by step under the instructor’s guidance.

What you will learn

Wind window and safety fundamentals

Equipment setup and kite theory

First kite flying skills

Body dragging in the water

Basic self-rescue techniques

Goal of the course

By the end of this course you will understand the core principles of kitesurfing and confidently control the kite in the water.

service_packages.name: 9Hours – Group Progression Pack
service_packages.description:
From Beginner to First Rides

This course continues the learning journey and is designed for students who want to progress from beginner level toward their first board rides.

Students still share one kite, but with extended lesson time allowing for deeper practice and faster progression.

What you will learn

Everything in the Starter Pack plus:

Advanced body dragging

Board introduction

First water starts

Short rides downwind

Board recovery techniques

Goal of the course

Most students completing this course will achieve their first rides on the board and begin controlling direction.

service_packages.name: 10h – Rider Progression Pack
service_packages.description:
A full training program designed to take you from complete beginner to independent rider.

What you will learn
Everything in previous packs plus:

Consistent water starts

Controlled rides in both directions

Speed and kite control while riding

Upwind riding fundamentals

Safe launching and landing

Independent riding skills

Goal of the course
Students completing this course typically reach IKO Level 3 (Independent Rider) or very close to it.

Ideal for
Students who want to become a self-sufficient kitesurfer as quickly as possible.

service_packages.name: Kitesurf Learning Package
service_packages.description:
Kitesurf Lesson & Accommodation Package

Combine your kitesurf training with a relaxing stay in Urla and enjoy the perfect balance of sport, comfort, and coastal lifestyle.

Our Lesson & Accommodation Package is designed for students who want to fully focus on learning kitesurfing while staying close to the spot. This package includes professional kitesurf lessons together with comfortable accommodation at our partner hotel.

During the day you will train with our certified instructors, learning step by step in safe conditions. After your sessions, you can relax, recover, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere of Urla.

What’s Included

Professional kitesurf lessons with certified instructors

All kitesurf equipment provided

Accommodation at our partner hotel

Daily transport between the hotel and the kite spot (if needed)

Access to our beach facilities

Perfect For

Complete beginners starting their kitesurf journey

Students who want an intensive learning experience

Travelers looking for a sport-focused holiday

Why Choose This Package

Staying close to the kite spot allows you to maximize your water time and learning progress while enjoying the comfort of a boutique hotel in one of the most beautiful kite destinations in the Aegean.

Whether you are coming for a few days or a full kitesurf holiday, this package makes your trip easy, efficient, and unforgettable.
